description: Archive one or more emails in Gmail. Archiving removes emails from inbox but keeps them in All Mail. This is a non-destructive operation with undo support.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Gmail archive is triggered by div[aria-label='Archive'] button. Can be used from thread view (archives current thread) or from inbox with selected emails (checkbox selection). Archive is non-destructive — emails move to All Mail and can be found via search or All Mail view. An undo notification appears briefly after archiving.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use aria-label for Archive button. Use role='checkbox' for email selection. Both are stable ARIA selectors.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Low bot detection risk — archive is a single click action. No text input required.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 3s + select/open 1s + archive click 1s + verify 1s. Typical: 6-8s.

email_index.description: Index of email to archive (0 = latest). Default 0.

archive_from.description: Where to archive from: 'thread' (open email first) or 'inbox' (select checkbox). Default 'thread'.

steps.description: Either open email thread or select checkbox depending on archive_from parameter

if_false.description: Select email checkbox in inbox for archiving

steps.description: Extract email subject for evidence before archiving
Verify archive succeeded — should return to inbox view

error_handling.archive_button_not_found: Archive button may not be visible — ensure email is selected or thread is open
error_handling.empty_inbox: Abort with NO_EMAILS error if inbox is empty
error_handling.session_expired: Detect accounts.google.com redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
